UpwardIQ Software Solutions

🚀 We’re Hiring: Gen AI Automation QE (Expert Level)
📍 Location: Bangalore
 💼 Employment Type: Full-Time / Contract (C2H)
 ⏳ Experience: 7+ Years
 ⚡ Notice Period: Immediate Joiners Preferred
 📌 Open Positions: 2

🔍 Role Overview
 We are looking for an Expert Quality Engineer (QE) with strong hands-on experience in test automation and AI-driven quality engineering. You will play a key role in designing and implementing automation strategies for a homegrown iTMS (Transportation Management System), driving efficiency, scalability, and faster delivery.

🛠️ Key Skills Required
 ✔️ Strong expertise in Java, Selenium, and Playwright
 ✔️ Experience with Gen AI tools (Cursor IDE / AI Studio or similar)
 ✔️ Proven ability to build automation frameworks from scratch
 ✔️ Knowledge of AI-assisted testing (self-healing scripts, optimization, AI insights)
 ✔️ Solid understanding of SDLC & Agile methodologies
 ✔️ Experience in testing complex enterprise applications
 ✔️ Strong analytical and communication skills

🌟 Nice to Have
 ✨ Experience in TMS / Logistics / Supply Chain platforms
 ✨ Exposure to CI/CD & DevOps practices
 ✨ Hands-on experience in API & backend automation testing
 ✨ Ability to mentor teams and provide technical leadership
 ✨ Familiarity with cloud-based testing environments

📩 Interested candidates can apply or DM me directly.
